summary: Completed testing of Payment System (Bank Transfer + KwikPay MOCKED) including all backend APIs, frontend pages, and PDF TIN/Registration support. Fixed ObjectId validation bugs in bank_transfer_routes.py and payment_admin_routes.py.

minor.issue: Bank details (bank_name, account_name, account_number, branch, swift_code) are empty - no bank configuration in environment variables

bank_transfer_api.create_intent: PASS - POST /api/payments/bank-transfer/intent creates payment with reference
bank_transfer_api.mark_submitted: PASS - POST /api/payments/bank-transfer/mark-submitted updates status to payment_submitted
bank_transfer_api.bank_details_structure: PASS - Returns bank_details with reference, amount, currency

kwikpay_api.intent_disabled: PASS - POST /api/payments/kwikpay/intent returns 400 (KwikPay not enabled) - MOCKED API

payment_admin_api.list_payments: PASS - GET /api/admin/payments returns list of payments
payment_admin_api.verify_payment: PASS - POST /api/admin/payments/{id}/verify sets status to paid
payment_admin_api.reject_payment: PASS - POST /api/admin/payments/{id}/reject sets status to rejected

validation.invalid_target_id: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid ObjectId format
validation.invalid_payment_id: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid payment_id in mark-submitted

frontend_payment_selection.mobile_money_section: PASS - Phone input and Pay with Mobile Money button present
frontend_payment_selection.bank_transfer_section: PASS - Pay via Bank Transfer button present
frontend_payment_selection.amount_display: PASS - Amount shown in TZS format

frontend_bank_transfer.bank_details: PASS - Shows bank details section (empty values need env config)
frontend_bank_transfer.confirm_form: PASS - Transaction reference input and confirm button present

frontend_payment_pending.navigation_buttons: PASS - Go to Dashboard and Continue Shopping buttons present

pdf_service.tin_support: PASS - pdf_service.py includes TIN and Business Registration in company and customer sections

quote_models.company_settings: PASS - CompanySettings model includes tin_number, business_registration_number, vat_number, default_tax_rate

action_items: Configure bank details in backend/.env (BANK_NAME, BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME, BANK_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, BANK_BRANCH, BANK_SWIFT_CODE)
Configure company TIN/Registration in admin settings for PDF display
Integrate actual KwikPay API credentials when available
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test orders for payment flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment system fully functional. Bank Transfer flow works end-to-end. KwikPay is MOCKED (returns 400 - not enabled). PDF service correctly supports TIN/Registration fields but company settings need to be configured via admin panel. ObjectId validation was added to prevent 500 errors on invalid IDs.

mocked_apis_list: POST /api/payments/kwikpay/intent - Returns 400 (KwikPay not enabled) until credentials configured

features_verified: POST /api/payments/bank-transfer/intent - Creates bank transfer payment intent
GET /api/admin/payments - Lists all payments with filters
Payment Selection page (/payment/select) - Shows Mobile Money and Bank Transfer options
Bank Transfer page (/payment/bank-transfer) - Shows bank details and reference
Payment Pending page (/payment/pending) - Shows pending status
Quote/Invoice models support customer_tin and customer_registration_number
Company settings model supports tax settings (default_tax_rate, tin_number, etc.)
PDF service includes TIN/Registration in company and customer sections
